# Lief Development

> Arizona's premier luxury home builder. Crafting homes that endure.

## URL
https://www.anewlief.com

## What We Are
Lief Development is a luxury home builder based in Arizona, specializing in custom residences that blend Japanese tranquility, Scandinavian minimalism, and the serenity of the Sonoran Desert. We call this approach SABS (Sonoran, Architectural, Balanced, Sustainable) construction.

## Design Philosophy
Every home is crafted with intention. The design language draws from three distinct traditions: the calm precision of Japanese architecture, the functional beauty of Scandinavian design, and the organic warmth of the Sonoran landscape. The result is homes that feel both timeless and rooted in their environment.

## Markets
Scottsdale, Paradise Valley, and the greater Phoenix metropolitan area in Arizona.

## Leadership
- Jesse Fowler. Founder and Principal. Over two decades of real estate development and construction experience, including founding Tellus Design + Build ($300M+ in completed projects over 14 years).

## Capabilities
- Custom luxury home design and construction
- SABS construction methodology
- Sustainable building practices
- Full-service development from concept to completion

## Part of the Common Ground Ecosystem
Lief Development is part of the Common Ground venture collective (https://commonground.ventures), a principal-led group that builds, funds, operates, and protects companies from the inside.

## Contact
https://www.anewlief.com
